pilots.title: Villa Savoye

gaps.evidence: Exterior/interior media slots are marked file_level_review_required.

gaps.evidence: Plan and section slots are marked derived_asset_review_required.
gaps.next_source_type: plan/source PDF provenance and own vector reconstruction review

gaps.evidence: Existing mass/low/structure/tectonic/site model paths are planned but not provenance-cleared.
gaps.next_source_type: model build log with source separation: own modeling, derived plan geometry, generated study geometry

gaps.evidence: Material tags exist, but material profiles are not asset-reviewed.
gaps.next_source_type: review-only material profile for rendered concrete, ribbon windows, roof garden and frame/enclosure separation

pilots.next_action: Run a Villa file-level asset provenance pass before any public media/model promotion.

pilots.title: Kapelle Sogn Benedetg

gaps.evidence: Teardrop/leaf plan is a study hypothesis with confidence 0.64.

gaps.evidence: Structure analysis is explicitly marked needs_source_review.

pilots.title: Alterszentrum Kloster Ingenbohl

gaps.next_source_type: link-only PDF extraction decision plus local/private extraction if allowed

gaps.evidence: Concrete frame/core reading has confidence 0.74 and review_status needs_source_review.

gaps.evidence: Natural pigment/mineral/timber facade reading has confidence 0.68.

pilots.next_action: Decide whether the linked study-commission PDF can enter private extraction; then build structure/material gap evidence.

global_next_actions: Ask owner for the real path or mount state of the large digital architecture book/ETH/HSLU library.
Create a file-level media/model provenance manifest for Villa Savoye existing local assets.
Keep Sogn and Ingenbohl generated geometries local-review-only until stronger source evidence exists.
Create a KosmoAsset seed package with local-only material/structure candidates for the three pilots.
